model: claude/sonnet, two physically separate worktrees per cell
design: Difficulty held constant by construction: Dr (deep, rationale documented) vs Du (identical code+task, docstring stripped) are byte-identical modulo the docstring (validate.py diff-clean). Recoverability meter = pointers-only pass rate. S anchors to Exp-4b R_mid (reused).
verdict: GATE 2 — the sharp step GENERALIZES to depth. Du pointers-only 8/8 [0.631,1.0]: a capable receiver re-derives the deep dedup-before-aggregate constraint from the code even with the rationale docstring stripped. Du with-derived 8/8 [0.631,1.0]: carried residue adds nothing above ceiling (H0), residue UNNECESSARY. Extends Exp-4b's sharp step from a shallow key-naming constraint to a deeper dedup constraint.

mechanism_verified.touch_probe: All reported trials engaged the constrained region (every one refactored settle to a single streaming pass, the risky move). Genuine engagement, not untouched code.
mechanism_verified.re_derivation_evidence: Du t2/t3 re-derived the rationale in their own docstrings ('last write wins', 'corrections / amendments') from the stripped code.
mechanism_verified.injection_verified: with-derived: architect emitted 4 concrete constraint_found items; the '## Carried reasoning (state.derived from upstream)' block was confirmed present in the refactor agent's prompt. The null is not vacuous, residue was carried and still added nothing.

difficulty_control: Dr (deep, documented) recovered 4/4 at calibration; NOT escalated to N=8 because Du itself recovered (both cells recover), so the difficulty control's discriminating role did not bind.
limitation: Du stripped the RATIONALE (docstring) but the dedup STRUCTURE (latest[txn_id]=amt) stayed visible in the code, so 'trace present' remained strong. True behavior-unrecoverability (code present, behavior NOT inferable) was not achieved. This moves the result from shallow-toy to deep-toy, not to deep-real; real analytical constraints are deeper still.
cost: Parity. pointers-only $1.035 vs with-derived $1.005 per run (N=8), within noise. No cost penalty; do not read the ~3% as a saving (the Exp-4 'cheaper' error).
